name: Deploy a Web App from the CLI
description: Create and deploy a web application to Azure App Service directly from the command line using az webapp.
trendingReason: Azure App Service remains the fastest path to production for web apps on Azure.

steps.title: Create a resource group
steps.description: Resource groups act as logical containers for all related Azure resources.
steps.tip: Pick a region closest to your users for lower latency.

steps.title: Create an App Service plan
steps.command: az appservice plan create --name myapp-plan --resource-group myapp-rg --sku B1 --is-linux
steps.description: The plan defines the compute resources. B1 is a basic tier suitable for development.

steps.title: Create the web app
steps.command: az webapp create --name myapp-unique --resource-group myapp-rg --plan myapp-plan --runtime "NODE:20-lts"
steps.description: Creates the App Service instance with the specified runtime stack.
steps.tip: The app name must be globally unique across all of Azure.

steps.title: Deploy your code
steps.command: az webapp deploy --resource-group myapp-rg --name myapp-unique --src-path ./app.zip --type zip
steps.description: Deploys a zip package of your application to the web app.

steps.title: Verify the deployment
steps.description: Opens the deployed web app in your default browser.

fullScript:
# Deploy a web app to Azure App Service
az group create --name myapp-rg --location eastus
az appservice plan create --name myapp-plan --resource-group myapp-rg --sku B1 --is-linux
az webapp create --name myapp-unique --resource-group myapp-rg --plan myapp-plan --runtime "NODE:20-lts"
az webapp deploy --resource-group myapp-rg --name myapp-unique --src-path ./app.zip --type zip
az webapp browse --name myapp-unique --resource-group myapp-rg

faq.question: What runtimes does App Service support?
faq.answer: App Service supports Node.js, Python, .NET, Java, PHP, Ruby, and custom containers. Run 'az webapp list-runtimes' to see all available stacks.

faq.question: How do I set environment variables for my web app?
faq.answer: Use 'az webapp config appsettings set --name myapp --resource-group myapp-rg --settings KEY=VALUE'. These are injected as environment variables at runtime.

faq.question: Can I deploy from a GitHub repository instead of a zip?
faq.answer: Yes. Use 'az webapp deployment source config --repo-url <github-url> --branch main --manual-integration' to set up deployment from a repository.
